HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[azure-ml] Reviewing Azure ML runtime, scheduling, endpoint, identity, and storage-linked workspace posture.
table view is compact by design; the JSON artifact keeps the fuller visible field set
ho-azure azure-ml

╭────────────┬────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────╮
│ workspace  │ runtime                        │ serving                                    │ identity                                     │ classification    │
├────────────┼────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────┤
│ ml-ops-hub │ compute=2; jobs=2; schedules=1 │ endpoints=1; auth=AADToken; public=Enabled │ SystemAssigned,UserAssigned; user-assigned=1 │ execution-capable │
╰────────────┴────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────╯
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ note                                                                                                                                        │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Visible Azure ML workspace already shows execution-capable runtime surfaces through compute, jobs, and an online endpoint.                  │
│ Cron-backed scheduling is also visible, and the workspace carries managed identity plus linked datastore and storage context for follow-up. │
│ Storage context: 2 visible datastore relationships, linked storage account, linked key vault, linked container registry.                    │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

╭──────────────────┬─────────────┬─────────┬──────────┬────────────────────────────────╮
│ workspace        │ runtime     │ serving │ identity │ classification                 │
├──────────────────┼─────────────┼─────────┼──────────┼────────────────────────────────┤
│ ml-nightly-train │ schedules=1 │ -       │ -        │ supporting-persistence-context │
╰──────────────────┴─────────────┴─────────┴──────────┴────────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ note                                                                               │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Visible recurrence-backed scheduling makes this workspace relevant as              │
│ persistence-adjacent ML context.                                                   │
│ The current control-plane read path does not yet prove a stronger compute, job, or │
│ serving surface behind that schedule.                                              │
│ Storage context: 1 visible datastore relationships, linked storage account.        │
╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

╭────────────┬─────────┬─────────┬──────────┬────────────────────╮
│ workspace  │ runtime │ serving │ identity │ classification     │
├────────────┼─────────┼─────────┼──────────┼────────────────────┤
│ ml-catalog │ -       │ -       │ -        │ supporting-context │
╰────────────┴─────────┴─────────┴──────────┴────────────────────╯
╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ note                                                             │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Visible Azure ML workspace currently reads more like supporting  │
│ context than an active execution surface.                        │
│ Storage-linked and datastore relationships are visible, but no   │
│ compute, job, schedule, or online endpoint is confirmed from the │
│ current read path.                                               │
│ Storage context: 2 visible datastore relationships, linked       │
│ storage account, linked app insights.                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 3 workspaces surfaced; 1 execution-capable and 1 persistence-adjacent from the current control-plane read path.
